flowReports.summary: State directory migration from .fase/ to .cogent/ works correctly when running any cogent command in a git repository.

details.isolationStrategy: Migration test used isolated temporary git repository with .fase/ directory to avoid touching real state.
details.note: This was a re-run after fix feature 'fix-state-migration' (commit 29ff2f1) implemented the MigrateLegacyRepoStateDirFrom() function. Round 1 had tested 7 assertions (6 passed, 1 failed). Round 2 re-tested only the failed assertion.
